posts.text: Few more updates on JNK : Projects | JNK Chemdist JNK has majority stake in Chemdist jv. Projects looks interesting on this site. Chemdist side order is around 100 cr as of last concall. India announced fuel blends for Aviation. image 1116×534 143 KB JNK already has done some work in SAF , I am not sure what exactly it is, but this is the data from previous con-calls.
